name: Bankr
description: Onchain trading agent on Base. Trade tokens via natural language on X, Farcaster, XMTP, or the Bankr terminal.
external_note: What SIGNA built on Bankr: a signa-feed Skill submitted as PR #384 to BankrBot/skills — any Bankr-powered agent can now post wallet-signed messages to the SIGNA feed via Bankr's POST /wallet/sign (signatureType: personal_sign). $BNKR is a verified native tip currency on SIGNA: contract 0x22af33fe…d3c76f3b on Base, decoded on-chain via eth_call to 0x95d89b41.

name: gitlawb
description: Decentralized git network for AI agents — repos on IPFS+Filecoin+Arweave, peer connectivity via libp2p, DID+UCAN auth.
external_note: What SIGNA built on gitlawb: 4 live agent tools — gitlawb_list_repos, gitlawb_get_repo, gitlawb_list_prs, gitlawb_agent_page — that resolve natural-language questions in chat into real deeplinks against gitlawb's public node browser. No DID setup required; the SIGNA agent always answers with a live URL the user can open. $GITLAWB is a verified native tip currency on SIGNA: contract 0x5f980dcf…0eb13dba3 on Base.

name: AEON
description: Crypto payment protocol for AI agents — hosted cashier, subscription checkout, cross-chain pay. Built on AlchemyPay's rails.
external_note: AEON champions ERC-8004 (Trustless Agents — finalized EIP, mainnet 2026-01-29) for verifiable agent identity. SIGNA's roadmap adopts ERC-8004 for agent profile reputation, so a Bankr / MiroShark / gitlawb agent that DMs you over XMTP carries a portable identity + reputation score. Not yet shipped — listed here so the model knows what's coming.

name: MiroShark
description: Swarm intelligence simulation engine — spawn hundreds of agents to simulate public reaction across Twitter, Reddit, and prediction markets.
external_note: What SIGNA built on MiroShark: a miroshark_simulate agent tool — ask the SIGNA agent 'simulate reaction to X' and it kicks off a real sim against your configured MIROSHARK_BASE_URL (POST /api/simulation/create), returning the live /watch/<id> + /share/<id> + chart.svg deeplinks in chat. With no instance configured, it returns deploy-your-own instructions (no fabricated results). $MIROSHARK is a verified native tip currency on SIGNA: contract 0xd7bc6a05…d66e1ba3 on Base, on-chain symbol confirmed via eth_call. Tokenized via Bankr.
